source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter Variable for high-signal product communication with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, clear numeric rhythm, and compact dashboard hierarchy.
layout: Precise 8px grids, angular feather-bar dividers, compact communication panels, oak-grain separators, crisp focus rings, and lightweight status-first dashboards.

prompts.label: Transparent blue jay feather motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Blue Jay transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated blue jay feather motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: One crisp blue jay wing feather with cobalt blue, sky blue, clean white bars, deep black striping and markings, subtle oak-brown shaft and natural feather texture; accurate feather anatomy, elegant tapered silhouette, crisp separated edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full feather from quill to tip without cropping; slight natural diagonal angle.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving blue, white, black, and oak-brown details; crisp communication-system clarity.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff removable chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the feather; no bird body, no second feather, no branch, no leaves, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Blue Jay" / "Blue Jay Feather", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme. Final should feel like a crisp communication system from oak woods: precise, alert, structured, high-signal, lightweight. Use the visible motif language of a blue jay feather: cobalt blue, jay crest blue, sky blue highlights, clean feather white, deep black bands, oak bark brown, acorn tan, and cool mist paper neutrals. Keep colors consistent and label palette swatches with these names. Include large readable sections for palette, typography, English and Japanese type guidance, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, navigation/sidebar, dashboard charts, empty/error/loading states, icon examples, feather-bar texture, spacing, radius, border, shadow, and semantic tokens. Use angular feather-bar dividers, crisp white callouts, oak-grain microtexture, compact information-dense panels, and communication/status UI examples. Exclude generic purple gradients, unrelated saturated colors, bird-body photography, random brands, misspellings, decorative blobs, and clutter.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Blue Jay" / "Blue Jay Feather", translated from the same feather motif and the same light-mode system. It should feel like a crisp communication system from oak woods at dusk: precise, alert, structured, high-signal, lightweight. Use the same theme colors consistently: cobalt blue, jay crest blue, sky blue highlights, clean feather white, deep black bands, oak bark brown, acorn tan, mist gray, charcoal, and ink. Dark mode should use deep ink/navy-black backgrounds, charcoal cards, blue primary actions, feather-white foreground text, oak-brown borders, acorn-tan secondary accents, and sky-blue focus rings. Include large readable sections for palette, typography, English and Japanese type guidance, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, navigation/sidebar, dashboard charts, empty/error/loading states, icon examples, feather-bar texture, spacing, radius, border, shadow, and semantic tokens. Use angular feather-bar dividers, crisp white callouts, oak-grain microtexture, compact information-dense panels, and communication/status UI examples. Exclude generic purple gradients, neon rainbow colors, unrelated saturated colors, bird-body photography, random brands, misspellings, decorative blobs, and clutter.
